game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
{
  "concept": "Arcade strategy where you aim a cannon, spawn units, and route them through blue multiplier gates to amplify your mob before it collides with enemy defenders and destroys their base. Core verbs: adjust aim, time volleys, thread mobs through moving gates/speed pads, and trigger a selected Champion ability to break stalemates. Progression revolves around unlocking/upgrading Cannons, Mobs, and Champions between runs. For this spec, the flow is re-framed into discrete levels with score-chasing: each stage is a short lane puzzle with dynamic gates and traps that rewards efficient pathing, smart Champion timing, and minimal losses.",
  "name": "Mob Control",
  "developer": "Voodoo",
  "genre": "Casual / Physics-Strategy",
  "price": "Free (Offers In-App Purchases)",
  "rating": "4.6/5 (371.3K ratings)",
  "rank": "#98 in Casual",
  "source_url": "https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mob-control/id1562817072",
  "level_structure": "Worlds 1–8. Each World has 12 stages: 9 standard (static/moving gates, speed pads), 2 special (Base Invasion or Counter-Attack variants), 1 Boss Level with fortified base and elite defenders. Clear any 8 stages in a World with rank ≥A to unlock its Boss; beating the Boss unlocks the next World. Champions League-style score thresholds unlock optional ‘Immortal’ challenge stages after World 4.",
  "scoring_model": {
    "base_clear": 1000,
    "time_bonus": "Up to +400 vs par (linear decay).",
    "pathing_bonus": "+10 per blue multiplier gate passed (value × 10); +50 for perfect blue-chain (no red/negative gates).",
    "survivor_bonus": "+1 per unit that reaches the enemy base (capped at +500).",
    "champion_play": "+100 for first successful Champion break (destroying a fortified node) and +50 for each additional unique Champion used.",
    "destruction_bonus": "+1 per obstacle destroyed; +25 per elite defender eliminated (cap +300).",
    "penalties": {
      "red_gate_penalty": "-25 per red/negative gate entered",
      "unit_loss": "-1 per unit lost to pits/traps (cap -300)",
      "retry": "-100 per restart"
    },
    "multipliers": {
      "clean_route": "×1.10 if no red gates hit",
      "boss_breach": "×1.15 if Boss base falls within 20% of par time"
    },
    "ranks": { "S": "≥2400", "A": "≥1900", "B": "≥1400", "C": "<1400" }
  },
  "keyboard_inputs": {
    "Aim Left/Right": "Left/Right",
    "Fine Aim": "A/D",
    "Fire / Hold to Stream": "Space",
    "Champion Ability": "Q",
    "Swap Champion": "E",
    "Switch Ammo/Cannon (if equipped)": "R",
    "Toggle Slow-Mo (aim assist)": "Shift",
    "Quick Volley (burst)": "F",
    "Restart Stage": "Z",
    "Next / Continue": "Enter",
    "Pause / Menu": "Esc"
  },
  "assumptions": [
    "Exact level count, world count, and rank thresholds are added for this spec; the store page mentions Boss Levels and competitive leagues but not a fixed stage schema.",
    "Keyboard bindings are chosen to satisfy the keyboard-only constraint; original game is touch-based.",
    "Scoring rubric (bonuses/penalties/multipliers) is designed to reflect the gate-multiplier and base-destruction mechanics while enabling clear S/A/B/C ranks.",
    "‘Special’ stages adapt the page’s Base Invasion/Counter-Attack modes into single-level objectives suitable for score play."
  ]
}
game_info.description: Guide your cannon-spawned mob through a gauntlet of gates and obstacles to destroy the enemy base! Blue gates multiply your units, red gates divide them. Time your volleys, thread through moving multipliers, and unleash Champion abilities to break through fortified defenses. Each level rewards efficient routing, smart ability timing, and minimal losses with score ranks from C to S. Chain blue gates perfectly for bonus points and avoid red gates to maximize your final army size!
game_info.controls:
Left/Right Arrow: Aim cannon direction
A/D: Fine-tune cannon aim
Space: Fire units (hold to stream)
Q: Activate Champion ability
E: Swap Champion (before firing)
Shift: Slow-motion aim assist
Z: Restart current level
Enter: Start game / Continue to next level
Esc: Pause / Unpause game

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic cannon firing and unit spawning mechanics. Validates that units are created when Space is pressed and they move forward correctly. Checks collision detection with gates and base destruction mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Fire units continuously at the enemy base without worrying about optimal gate routing. Aim straight ahead and maintain constant fire to ensure units reach the base. Monitor unit count and base health to validate damage mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Units should spawn consistently, move toward the base, and deal damage on contact. The test succeeds when the enemy base is destroyed (GAME_OVER_WIN state) within a reasonable time frame, validating core mechanics work properly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal gameplay strategy to achieve high scores and S-rank. Validates gate multiplier mechanics, Champion ability timing, and efficient pathing through blue gates while avoiding red gates.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Carefully aim to thread units through all blue multiplier gates in sequence. Use Champion ability strategically when unit count is high to maximize impact. Avoid all red gates and time volleys to maintain unit density through multipliers.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve S-rank (score ≥2400) by maximizing pathing bonus, survivor bonus, and clean route multiplier. Test succeeds when GAME_OVER_WIN is reached with high score, validating that skilled play leads to top ranks.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests Champion ability mechanics and swap functionality. Validates that different Champions have distinct effects and that switching Champions works correctly before firing.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Swap between available Champions using E key before firing. Use Q to activate Champion abilities at strategic moments. Test both Champions to ensure each has unique effects on gameplay.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Champions swap correctly, abilities activate when Q is pressed with cooldown working, and each Champion provides distinct tactical advantages. Test succeeds when both Champions are used successfully in a single level.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests slow-motion aim assist feature and fine aiming controls. Validates that Shift key slows game speed for precision aiming and that A/D keys provide fine-tuned angle adjustments.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Toggle slow-motion with Shift while adjusting aim with A/D keys for precise gate threading. Fire units to verify slow-mo affects game speed but not controls. Test both normal and slow-mo modes repeatedly.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game speed reduces noticeably when Shift is held, A/D keys provide smaller angle adjustments than arrow keys, and precision aiming leads to better gate routing. Test succeeds when high accuracy shots are achieved using slow-mo.
